summary: Tested cluster-wise tab functionality on Daily Report and Monthly Report pages. All features working as expected.

issues: Console warning: 'Of the table content, 50/26 units width could not fit page' — minor PDF table overflow warning from jspdf-autotable, does not prevent download or break content

Minor PDF table width warning in console is cosmetic only.
